title: Web 2.0 expo 2008
body: I would have liked to be in San Francisco these days, not only because it is a city that I still don't know and that I know I would love, also because there they are now holding an event about the present and future of the Internet, the **Web 2.0 expo**. Luckily, thanks to the fact that I follow some of his assistants live [Twitter](http://www.xarop.com/category/web-20/twitter-web-20/) or *blogs* like that of [Tirso](http://tirsomaldonado.com/?s=web+2.0+expo), which I recommend that you read, I am more or less aware that it is happening there. Very interesting things are being said and I have the feeling that I will need time to read, assume and channel all this information.
